name: Peanut Butter Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients together.
2. Slowly add water to peanut butter until smooth.
3. Stir in the egg yolks, then add the gelatin mixture and cool.
4. Add vanilla and chill until partially set.
5. Beat egg whites to soft peaks, then add 2 tablespoons sugar and beat to stiff peaks; fold into the first mixture.
6. Whip cream until stiff and fold into the pie mixture.
7. Slice banana into the pastry shell and top with the filling.
8. Garnish with globs of whipping cream with a slice of banana in each glob.
